creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 253183
Total five commits updating binutils and leaf ports

(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #17)

Use this. It contains the five following commits:

* 823760b28b0d fc6d77feeeb3  2024-08-30 - (HEAD -> binutils-243) devel/elf-dissector: Depend on binutils/gnuliliberty 2.43 
|        
* a49eb79e49db ffeddf278ec3  2024-08-30 - devel/gnulibiberty: Update to 2.43 
|        
* 57bd1f31ee09 72d0c8e142ce  2024-08-26 - devel/binutils: update to 2.43 
|        
* 30130d557acc 0bb73a55c1f5  2024-08-30 - (elf-dissector) devel/elf-dissector: Depend on binutils/gnuliliberty 2.40 
|        
* 32e043822c3b 98adae5be89a  2024-08-30 - devel/gnulibiberty: Update to 2.40 
|        error: gpg.ssh.allowedSignersFile needs to be configured and exist for ssh signature verification
